heco_requirement: 20 Contract Years after COD (Model RDG PPA Sec 12.1); Company option to purchase at end
mainland_norm: 15-25 yr typical; 20 yr common
softening_option: None needed
source: Model RDG PPA (PV+BESS) Appx J Sec 12.1

heco_requirement: $50/kW of Contract Capacity irrevocable standby LOC from A- rated US bank; 50% within 10 days of execution + 50% at IRS Amendment; replenish to 3x cap
mainland_norm: No universal std; construction security often sized to per-diem delay damages; LOC or investment-grade parent guarantee
softening_option: Accept investment-grade parent guarantee in lieu of LOC; smaller tranche pre-IRS
source: Model RDG PPA Sec 14.2 / Stoel Rives Law of Solar

heco_requirement: $75/kW of Contract Capacity LOC held the ENTIRE 20-yr term; A- issuing-bank rating maintained every year; no step-down
mainland_norm: Delivery/performance security common but often steps down after COD or sized to ~6 mo cover damages
softening_option: Step security down after a proven-performance period; allow parent guarantee

heco_requirement: LOC bank must hold S&P A- or better for full term; replace within 30 days if downgraded
mainland_norm: Investment-grade issuer typical; A- for full 20 yr is stringent
softening_option: Relax to BBB+/investment-grade; longer cure

heco_requirement: Developer pays all Total Estimated Interconnection Cost (Rule 14H) plus LOC for any overage; funds all Company-Owned Interconnection Facilities
mainland_norm: Varies; ERCOT connect-and-manage socializes network upgrades; many US IOUs cost-share; PJM upgrades spiked $29->$240/kW
softening_option: Connect-and-manage / socialize deep network upgrades; cap developer exposure

heco_requirement: Escalation over PPA term PROHIBITED; fixed nominal $ (RFP Sec 3.9.2); pricing cannot be contingent on tax/ITC (3.9.1)
mainland_norm: Many mainland PPAs fixed but escalators (~1.5-2.5%/yr) and some indexed products exist
softening_option: Add CPI/commodity index or defined re-opener band to survive input inflation

heco_requirement: Approved price effectively not re-openable; 2022-02-15 amendment requests denied 2022-03-02 -> Longroad walked (Mahi/Pulehu)
mainland_norm: PPAs generally fixed but bilateral renegotiation more feasible outside a monopsony auction
kiuc: KIUC renegotiated bilaterally (Kapaia 2014) when RFP failed
softening_option: Pre-agreed re-pricing formula for commodity/AD-CVD shocks pre-COD

heco_requirement: Single monthly Lump Sum Payment for (i) actual output on dispatch (ii) availability of Net Energy Potential (iii) BESS availability - availability/tolling-style
mainland_norm: Energy $/MWh (as-generated) most common; capacity/tolling used for storage & dispatchable
kiuc: Dispatchable PV-peaker; KIUC pays for dispatchable capacity+energy
softening_option: None; availability payment actually shields developer from curtailment

heco_requirement: Lump Sum paid for AVAILABILITY regardless of dispatch; downward-adjusted only for Force Majeure unavailability - so curtailment is not a developer revenue loss
mainland_norm: Deemed-generated/economic-curtailment compensation increasingly standard; buyers negotiate cap on uncompensated curtailment
kiuc: Dispatchable design; curtailment absorbed by battery
softening_option: None on revenue; ensure availability metric not degraded by Company-ordered curtailment
source: Model RDG PPA Sec 2.1/2.3; Stoel Rives; NREL 66543

heco_requirement: Company maintains EXCLUSIVE right to fully direct charge/discharge; battery must be 100% grid-chargeable at Company direction after 5-yr ITC period; no developer arbitrage
mainland_norm: Merchant/hybrid PPAs increasingly leave some battery dispatch/arbitrage to developer
kiuc: KIUC also dispatches battery (Lawai PV-peaker load-following under KIUC control)
softening_option: Keep utility control for reliability; allow shared value/arbitrage credit
source: Stage2 RFP Sec 1.2.9-1.2.11; Model RDG PPA

heco_requirement: Proposers may not propose ANY degradation for capacity or efficiency over full 20-yr term (RFP Sec 2.1); functionality maintained entire term
mainland_norm: Mainland guarantees a degradation curve (~0.5%/yr) & 90-95% output guarantee - degradation expected/priced
softening_option: Allow realistic degradation curve or oversizing credit rather than zero-degradation

heco_requirement: PV System Equivalent Availability Factor >=98% (12-mo basis); LDs below 98%
mainland_norm: Output guarantee typically 90-95% of P50/P99 energy
softening_option: Lower to ~95-97% or use energy (not availability) basis

heco_requirement: BESS Capacity (4-hr)
mainland_norm: EAF
more_onerous: and Round-Trip-Efficiency metrics each with LDs; 4-hr duration; FFR contingency storage >=5MW/30min, 4-hr duration & RTE guarantees standard; FFR less common on mainland, 4-hr storage (Mana/Kaahanui); dispatchable, partial
softening_option: None; duration/FFR are genuine island reliability needs
source: Stage2 RFP Sec 1.2.10-1.2.12; Model RDG PPA Sec 2.4

heco_requirement: Must operate in grid-forming mode when directed; full LVRT/HVRT/UFRT/OFRT + transient-stability ride-through; reactive power at zero real power; black-start preferred
mainland_norm: Grid-following historically standard; ride-through per IEEE 1547; grid-forming still emerging on mainland
kiuc: KIUC requires black-start & advanced inverter functions
softening_option: None; grid-forming/ride-through essential on isolated grid

heco_requirement: Real-time telemetry of available energy for Company dispatch; critical telemetry sample rates; Company control system integration
mainland_norm: SCADA/telemetry standard for utility-scale
softening_option: None

heco_requirement: GCOD fixed at proposal and NON-adjustable (RFP 1.2.15); a Guaranteed Milestone inserted without amendment; daily delay LDs (~0.2%/day of monthly lump sum example) drawn from Development Security
mainland_norm: Delay damages per-diem standard; but GCOD extensions for buyer/interconnection-caused delay usually available
softening_option: Grant GCOD relief / no LD for HECO-caused interconnection delay
source: Stage2 RFP 1.2.15; Model RDG PPA (LD examples)

heco_requirement: Historically penalized developer delay but not utility interconnection delay; PA Consulting recommended a PIM for utility-caused delay
mainland_norm: Interconnection-caused delay typically excused for seller
softening_option: Add utility-delay PIM + automatic GCOD tolling for HECO-caused delay

heco_requirement: Proposer must pursue max state tax credit and remit proceeds to Company for customers; LD for failure to pursue; price set without state credits
mainland_norm: Not a standard mainland term
softening_option: Retain (ratepayer benefit) but remove LD-for-failure asymmetry

heco_requirement: Seller solely responsible for decommissioning + site restoration at term end (Attachment G Sec 7)
mainland_norm: Decommissioning bonds $15k-75k/MW increasingly required by permit
softening_option: None

heco_requirement: Proposal cannot rely on any proposed change in law/rule (1.2.19); change-in-tax risk largely developer-borne
mainland_norm: Change-in-law relief clauses common; often shared
softening_option: Add change-in-law cost-sharing for post-execution federal tariff/tax shocks
source: Stage2 RFP Sec 1.2.19; Model RDG PPA

heco_requirement: FM excuses performance; Lump Sum adjusted downward for FM unavailability (Sec 2.3); Article 21
mainland_norm: Standard FM allocation
softening_option: None

heco_requirement: Article 19 transfers/assignments/facility-debt; collateral assignment to Facility Lender permitted; lender step-in/cure rights
mainland_norm: Financeable lender-consent + collateral assignment standard
softening_option: None; already financeable

heco_requirement: HECO self-build NOT required to sign a PPA; may adjust operational requirements with PUC approval; LDs paid from shareholder funds via PPAC; interconnection costs "not comparable" to IPPs
mainland_norm: IOU self-build vs IPP asymmetry a general concern; some states bar or ring-fence utility self-build
softening_option: Symmetric proforma treatment; comparable interconnection cost accounting; independent self-build check
source: Stage2 RFP Sec 3.8.4 & 1.9; PA Consulting Phase 2

heco_requirement: Projects must be >5 MW (RFP 1.2.7) - sized to competitive-bidding waiver; <=5 MW routes outside RFP
mainland_norm: No comparable floor on mainland merchant/RFP
softening_option: Standardized <=5 MW standard-offer proforma tied to 20-acre by-right land threshold

mainland_norm: 000 non-refundable per proposal; non-negotiable NDA required, Bid fees smaller/uncommon
softening_option: Reduce/refundable fee for small projects
